title: grants — feature keys
description: Business features this module publishes for tenant-facing UX. Resolved by the tenant client from GET /api/auth/me → data.features. Distinct from entitlements (quota + gate) — features control whether the UI SHOWS a capability. Downstream consumer modules (finance, sports, teams, documents) also gate their share-access buttons behind `grants.share_access`.

features.description: Enables the Google-Docs-style 'Share' dialog on grantable resources. Members can grant access on resources they own; admins can grant on any resource. Available on every plan.
Enables the /audit-resource-access screen that enumerates every grant on a specific resource + the /audit-principal screen that lists every grant a principal holds. Available from small plan up.
Surfaces the 'Upload CSV' button on the grant management screen. Medium plan+.
Surfaces the 'Deny access' option in the share-access dialog. Deny grants are inviolable — the UI adds a confirmation modal explaining the semantics before submit. Enterprise-only.

Enables the quarterly access-review workflow: a scheduled reminder to a compliance officer to walk the `grants:audit-principal` output for every user in a role and confirm continued need. ISO 27001 A.9.2.5 evidence. Enterprise + compliance module.
